title: Sqlitelogictest unavailable calc.- MAL operations
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, value1 INT, value2 INT, value3 INT);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES(1, 10, 20, 30), (2, NULL, 40, 50), (3, 60, NULL, 70);
SELECT value1 + CAST(NULL AS INT) FROM test_table;
SELECT value2 * -1 + CAST(NULL AS INT) FROM test_table WHERE value3 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: SELECT statements with NULL casting in calculations
